{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{"容器列表"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"容器列表"|$.T}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}
    {{`清理容器`|$.T}} {{"删除选中"|$.T}} {{`新建容器`|$.T}}

    {{"容器列表"|$.T}}

    {{- range $k, $v := $.Stored.listData -}} {{- if gt (len $v.Names) 0 -}} {{- $shortenID := call $.Func.ShortenID $v.ID -}} {{- $name := index $v.Names 0 -}} {{- end -}} {{- end -}}
    		{{`容器名称`|$.T}}/ID {{`镜像名称`|$.T}}/ID {{`网络/端口`|$.T}} {{`IP`|$.T}} {{`挂载`|$.T}} {{`状态`|$.T}} {{`创建时间`|$.T}} {{`文件`|$.T}} {{`控制`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Names}} {{if gt $kk 0}} / {{end}} {{TrimPrefix $vv `/`}} {{end}}
    {{$shortenID}}     		{{$shortenImageID := call $.Func.ShortenID $v.ImageID}} {{if eq $v.Image $v.ImageID}} {{`无`|$.T}} {{else}} {{$v.Image}} {{end}}
    {{$shortenImageID}}     		{{$v.HostConfig.NetworkMode}}
    {{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Ports}} {{if gt $kk 0}}
    {{end}} {{$vv.IP}}:{{$vv.PublicPort}}{{$vv.PrivatePort}} {{end}}     		{{- range $kk,$vv:=$v.NetworkSettings.Networks -}} {{$vv.IPAddress}}
    {{- end -}}     		{{if $v.Mounts}} {{`查看`|$.T}} {{$.Fetch "docker/base/container/detail/mounts" $v.Mounts}}
    {{else}} {{`无`|$.T}} {{end}}     		{{$v.State}}
    {{$v.Status}}     		{{(Date $v.Created).Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}} {{`导出`|$.T}} {{`导入`|$.T}} {{`浏览`|$.T}} {{- if eq $v.State `running` -}} {{- else if eq $v.State `paused` -}} {{- else -}} {{- end}} {{if eq $v.State `running` `paused` -}} {{- end -}} 
    {{$v.Command|Nl2br}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
